# Ruthless OS

> AI-powered problem-solving operating system: diagnose root causes, score solutions, plan execution, and monitor risk through a 4-stage workflow.

Ruthless OS helps teams turn vague problems into ranked solutions, concrete execution plans, KPIs, and live risk monitoring — orchestrated by AI agents.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Landing page with the instant problem solver and workflow overview.
- [Problem Intake](/intake): Stage 1 — capture problems and run root cause analysis.
- [Solutions](/solutions): Stage 2 — AI-generated solutions scored on 6 dimensions.
- [Execution](/execution): Stage 3 — turn chosen solutions into tasks, KPIs, and milestones.
- [Risk Monitor](/monitoring): Stage 4 — KPI health, kill-switches, and audit log.
- [Dashboard](/dashboard): Real-time view of active problems, KPI health, and alerts.
- [AI Coach](/coach): Conversational AI assistant for problem-solving guidance.
- [Debate Room](/debate): Multi-agent AI debate that converges on a verdict.
- [Prompt Export](/prompt-export): Export structured problem data as agent-ready prompt packages.

## Optional

- [Auth](/auth): Sign in / sign up.
- [Settings](/settings): Account and preferences.
